thinking.text: The user is satisfied and has applied for the Gold Rewards Card. No further action needed from me. I'll just wrap up nicely.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome! I'm glad I could help you find the perfect card. 🎉

Just a quick recap of what to expect with your **Gold Rewards Card**:
- **2.5% cash back** on every purchase you make
- **$0 annual fee**
- Your Rho‑Bank+ subscription from your company will cover the eligibility requirement

Once your application is approved, you'll receive your card and can start earning cash back right away. If you ever have any questions about your account, rewards, or anything else, don't hesitate to reach out. Enjoy your new card and happy spending! 😊
